findings.description: Header elements originally in a two-column layout are collapsed into a single column.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the agency logo is on the left and the official names/titles are right-aligned in a separate block. In the HTML, the names and titles appear directly beneath the logo, losing the side-by-side layout.

findings.description: Sentences and list items are broken into separate HTML tags because page footers were retained inline, interrupting the text flow.
findings.evidence:
In the HTML: '

...additional time was provided after everyone that registered to

Page 2 of 4

speak was finished...' and '...do not present a

Page 3 of 4

substantial likelihood...'
